description: Complete dashboard redesign into an adaptive Command Center with journal adjacency, rule compliance scorecard, P&L calendar, and page snapshots

userStories.title: Audit Existing Dashboard & Utilities
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to audit existing dashboard code and utilities before implementing the Command Center so that we reuse components and avoid duplication.
acceptanceCriteria: Document current dashboard components and their data sources in scripts/ralph/progress.txt
Search src/lib/ for date/calendar utilities that can be reused
Search for existing P&L calculation utilities
Search for existing journal/checklist status utilities
Identify components to keep vs replace
userStories.notes: Audit complete. Documented all existing utilities, components to keep/replace, and new endpoints needed.

userStories.title: Create Trading Context Hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a hook that determines the user's trading context based on their actual activity so that the dashboard can adapt its layout and emphasis.
acceptanceCriteria: Hook returns: hasOpenPositions (boolean), tradedToday (boolean), journaledToday (boolean), lastTradeTime (Date | null), suggestedAction ('start-journal' | 'review-trades' | 'log-trade' | 'idle')
suggestedAction logic: Traded today + no journal = 'start-journal', Has unreviewed trades = 'review-trades', No trades today = 'log-trade', Otherwise = 'idle'
Hook fetches data via existing tRPC queries
userStories.notes: Uses dailyJournal.getWithTrades as single data source for all context information.

userStories.title: Create Dashboard Layout Grid Component
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a responsive grid layout component for the Command Center so that widgets can be arranged in a cohesive dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: CSS Grid layout with named areas for widget placement
Responsive: 3-column on desktop, 2-column on tablet, 1-column on mobile
Supports widget size variants: sm (1x1), md (2x1), lg (2x2), wide (3x1)
Terminal design system styling (dark bg, border accents)
userStories.notes: Grid uses auto-rows-fr for flexible heights. GridItem wrapper applies col/row spans.

userStories.title: Create Base Dashboard Widget Component
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a reusable widget wrapper component so that all dashboard cards have consistent styling and behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Props: title, icon, size, href (optional link to full page), loading, children
Terminal window chrome styling (title bar with action dots)
View More link in header when href provided
Hover state with subtle glow effect
userStories.notes: Includes WidgetSkeleton and WidgetEmptyState helper components.

userStories.title: Create tRPC Endpoint for Journal Adjacency Data
userStories.description: As a frontend, I want an API endpoint that returns journal completion status alongside trading days so that the streak widget can display accurate data.
acceptanceCriteria: Add getJournalAdjacency query to dailyJournal router
Returns array of: { date, hasTrades, tradeCount, pnl, hasJournal, journalWordCount, checklistCompletion }
Efficient query joining trades and journals by date
userStories.notes: Uses user timezone for trade grouping. Word count strips HTML tags.

userStories.title: Integration Tests for Journal Adjacency Endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests for the journal adjacency endpoint so that we verify correct data aggregation.
acceptanceCriteria: Test returns correct data for dates with trades + journal
Test returns correct data for dates with trades + no journal
Test returns correct data for dates with no trades

userStories.title: Create tRPC Endpoint for Rule Compliance Summary
userStories.description: As a frontend, I want an API endpoint that calculates rule compliance for a date range so that the widget can display accurate scorecard data.
acceptanceCriteria: Add getRuleCompliance query to strategies router
Returns: { overall: number, byCategory: { entry, exit, risk, management }, violations: [{ ruleId, ruleName, count }] }
Calculates from trade rule check records

userStories.title: Integration Tests for Rule Compliance Endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests for the rule compliance endpoint so that we verify correct calculations.
acceptanceCriteria: Test returns 100% when all rules followed
Test returns correct % with partial compliance

userStories.title: Create Journal Status Widget
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to see today's journal status prominently so that I never forget to journal on trading days.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows status: Not Started / In Progress / Completed
One-click Start Journal or Continue Journal button

userStories.title: Create Journal Streak Calendar Widget
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to see a calendar showing which trading days I journaled so that I can maintain consistency.
acceptanceCriteria: Color coding: Traded+Journaled (green), Traded+No Journal (red/warning), No Trades (neutral)
Shows current streak count (e.g., 5 day streak)
Shows completion rate (e.g., 23/25 trading days journaled)
Hover on date shows: trade count, journal status, P&L

userStories.title: Create Journal Metrics Widget
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to see journal metrics (completion rate, avg word count, emotional patterns) so that I can track my journaling habits.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows: Completion rate %, Avg word count, Most common emotional state
Sparkline chart for journal length over last 30 days
Compact layout fitting sm widget size

userStories.title: Create Recent Journal Excerpts Widget
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to see snippets from my recent journal entries so that I can recall recent insights without navigating away.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows last 3 journal entries as cards
Each card: date, first ~100 chars of content (stripped HTML), P&L badge
Truncate with ... and Read more link

userStories.title: Create Rule Compliance Scorecard Widget
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to see what percentage of today's trades followed my strategy rules so that I stay accountable.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows overall compliance percentage with circular gauge
Breakdown by rule category (Entry, Exit, Risk, Management)
List of violated rules with violation count

userStories.title: Create P&L Calendar Widget
userStories.description: As a trader, I want a P&L calendar heatmap so that I can visually see my daily performance over time.
acceptanceCriteria: Heatmap coloring: profit intensity (greens), loss intensity (reds), no trades (neutral)
Hover shows: date, P&L amount, trade count, win rate
Summary row: total P&L, trading days, win rate for displayed month
Uses md or lg widget size

userStories.title: Create Analytics Snapshot Widget
userStories.description: As a trader, I want a mini-preview of my analytics so that I can see key metrics without navigating to the full page.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows: Win Rate gauge, Profit Factor, Current Streak, Expectancy
Period toggle: Today / This Week / This Month

userStories.title: Create Strategies Snapshot Widget
userStories.description: As a trader, I want a mini-preview of my strategy performance so that I can see which strategies are working.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows top 3 strategies by P&L (mini leaderboard)
Each row: strategy name, color dot, P&L, trade count
Shows No strategies empty state if none configured

userStories.title: Create Recent Trades Snapshot Widget
userStories.description: As a trader, I want a mini-preview of my recent trades so that I can see latest activity at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows last 5 trades in compact list
Each row: symbol, direction icon, P&L (colored), time ago
Quick stats row: Today's trades count, Today's P&L

userStories.title: Create Today's Performance Widget
userStories.description: As a trader, I want a prominent display of today's trading performance so that I can track my daily progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Large P&L display with profit/loss coloring
Trade count, Win/Loss count, Win rate
Comparison to daily average: Above/Below average
For prop accounts: Daily loss limit progress bar
Shows No trades yet state when tradedToday is false

userStories.title: Create Quick Actions Widget
userStories.description: As a trader, I want contextual quick action buttons so that I can perform common tasks without navigation.
acceptanceCriteria: Actions adapt based on user's actual trading context from use-trading-context hook
Has open positions = View Open Positions prominent
Traded today + no journal = Start Journal prominent
Has unreviewed trades = Review Trades prominent
Default actions always available: Log Trade, View Analytics, View Strategies
Primary action highlighted based on suggestedAction from context hook

userStories.title: Assemble Command Center Dashboard Page
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to assemble all widgets into the new Command Center dashboard page replacing the old dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Top row: Today's Performance (wide), Quick Actions
Left column: Journal Status, Journal Streak, Rule Compliance
Right column: Analytics Snapshot, Strategies Snapshot, Recent Trades
Pass trading context to widgets that need it
Loading states for all async data
Verify in browser - all widgets render correctly

userStories.title: Add Dashboard Widget Loading Skeletons
userStories.description: As a trader, I want smooth loading states so that the dashboard feels responsive while data loads.
acceptanceCriteria: Create skeleton variants for each widget type in dashboard-widget.tsx or separate file
Subtle pulse animation using Tailwind animate-pulse
No layout shift when data loads

userStories.title: E2E Tests for Command Center Dashboard
userStories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests for the Command Center so that we verify the dashboard works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test dashboard loads with all widgets visible
Test journal status click opens journal
All new UI elements have data-testid attributes

userStories.title: Mobile Responsive Adjustments
userStories.description: As a trader on mobile, I want the Command Center to be usable on smaller screens so that I can check my dashboard on the go.
acceptanceCriteria: Widgets stack in priority order (Today's Performance first)
P&L Calendar switches to compact week view on mobile
Quick Actions become bottom sheet or collapsible
Verify in browser at mobile viewport
